zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire於1386年9月14日出生在英國艾可素斯 奧肯登時，他的父親Sir Ingram Bruyn32歲，母親Elizabeth de la Pole24歲。他和Elizabeth Retford至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1467年11月8日在他的家鄉享年81歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可素斯 奧肯登。

nameMeanings.name: Bruyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bruin
meanings: Dutch: from a personal name based on Middle Dutch bruun ‘brown’, or a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion. Compare De Bruin and Bruyn .
English: of uncertain origin. It may, as Reaney suggested, reflect a pronunciation of French   Brun   ‘brown’.

nameMeanings.name: Maurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Mauricius, a derivative of Maurus (a byname meaning ‘Moor’, i.e. ‘dark, swarthy’), borne by, among others, an early Byzantine emperor ( c.539–602 ). It was introduced to Britain by the Normans and was popular in the Middle English period, but was not widely adopted by the nobility and became rare in the 17th century. Between the mid-19th century and the 1940s, it was moderately popular but has since faded again. See also Morris .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire was born on 14 September 1386, in South Ockendon, Essex, England, his father, Sir Ingram Bruyn, was 32 and his mother, Elizabeth de la Pole, was 24. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Elizabeth Retford. He died on 8 November 1467, in his hometown, at the age of 81, and was buried in South Ockendon, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire est né le 14 septembre 1386, à South Ockendon, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ingram Bruyn, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de la Pole, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Elizabeth Retford. Il est décédé le 8 novembre 1467, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à South Ockendon, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire am 14. September 1386 in South Ockendon, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ingram Bruyn 32 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de la Pole 24. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Retford mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. November 1467 im Alter von 81 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in South Ockendon, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire è nato il il 14 settembre 1386 nel South Ockendon, Essex, England, il suo padre, Sir Ingram Bruyn, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de la Pole, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Elizabeth Retford. Morì il 8 novembre 1467, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a South Ockendon, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshireが1386年9月14日にイギリスエセックスソウス オクエンドンで生まれた時，父Sir Ingram Bruynは32歳，母Elizabeth de la Poleは24歳であった。彼はElizabeth Retfordとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1467年11月8日に故郷で81歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスソウス オクエンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire(이)가 1386년 9월 14일 영국 에세스 소우스 옥켄던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ingram Bruyn(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de la Pole(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Retford(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1467년 11월 8일 그의 고향에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 소우스 옥켄던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire nasceu em 14 de setembro de 1386, em South Ockendon, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ingram Bruyn, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de la Pole, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Elizabeth Retford. Ele faleceu em 8 de novembro de 1467, em sua cidade natal, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em South Ockendon, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Maurice Bruyn High Sheriff of Hertfordshire родился 14 сентября 1386 г. в местности соут оккендон, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Ingram Bruyn было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de la Pole, 24. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Elizabeth Retford. Он умер 8 ноября 1467 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности соут оккендон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
